MONTHLY SALES REPORT — FEBRUARY 2025
Prepared by: Finance & Analytics Team
Circulation: Executive Leadership

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Total revenue for February 2025 was $2,340,870, up 7.2 % month-over-month
and 14.8 % year-over-year.  North America led growth at +19 % YoY.

REGIONAL BREAKDOWN

  North America    $1,180,400   50.4 %   +19 % YoY
  Europe             $640,300   27.3 %    +9 % YoY
  Asia-Pacific       $380,170   16.2 %   +12 % YoY
  Rest of World      $140,000    6.1 %    +4 % YoY

TOP 5 PRODUCTS BY REVENUE

  1. Enterprise Suite Pro      $520,000
  2. Standard Licence Pack     $410,000
  3. Support & Maintenance      $310,000
  4. Professional Services      $240,000
  5. Add-on Modules              $180,000

PIPELINE
Qualified pipeline entering March stands at $4.1 M.  Key deals expected to
close in Q1: Project Atlas ($380 K) and Northstar Renewal ($220 K).

HEADCOUNT
Sales headcount: 48 full-time (two open roles in EMEA).
